summary: Comprehensive testing of Bible reading app MVP completed. Backend API testing: 28/29 tests passed (96.5% success rate). Frontend UI testing: Most features working correctly with some navigation and display issues identified.

minor.issue: External Bible API (wldeh/bible-api CDN) returning empty verses array. API endpoint structure is correct but external data source is not providing chapter text.
minor.note: This is an external API issue, not our code. Endpoint returns 200 with correct structure but empty verses.

ui_bugs.issue: Reading plans not displaying in UI despite API returning 5 plans correctly. Plans array is being set in state but not rendering in the view.
ui_bugs.reproduction: Login -> Navigate to Plans tab -> Browse tab shows no plans

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking book buttons in Bible Map does not navigate to Reader screen. Navigation logic may not be triggering properly.
ui_bugs.reproduction: Login -> Bible Map -> Click any book button -> Reader does not open

integration_issues.issue: Frontend not rendering plans data from API. API call succeeds (verified in backend tests) but UI shows empty state.
Navigation from Bible Map to Reader screen not working. Router.push may not be executing or route params not being passed correctly.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'AsyncStorageError: Native module is null, cannot access legacy storage' in AuthContext.tsx line 36. This is a known issue with AsyncStorage on web preview but does not affect functionality.
react_native_issues.note: Auth is working correctly despite this warning. This is expected behavior for Expo web preview.

action_items: Fix Plans screen rendering issue - API returns data but UI not displaying the 5 reading plans
Fix Bible Map to Reader navigation - clicking book buttons should open Reader screen
Investigate external Bible API (wldeh/bible-api) empty verses issue or consider alternative Bible text source
Add error handling for empty Bible chapter responses in Reader screen
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 24: JWT_SECRET has default fallback value - should fail fast if not set in production
server.py line 33: DB_NAME has default fallback - should fail fast if not set
Plans screen (plans.tsx): Data is being fetched and set in state but not rendering - check map() function and conditional rendering logic
Reader navigation: router.push() call may need verification of route structure and params
All testID attributes are properly implemented for testing - good practice
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded automatically on backend startup. Test users created during pytest execution with TEST_ prefix for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs are solid (96.5% pass rate). Main issues are frontend: (1) Plans screen not rendering the 5 plans despite successful API call, (2) Bible Map book buttons not navigating to Reader. Auth, Dashboard, Mood, Profile, and Theme toggle all working correctly. External Bible API returning empty verses but that's not our bug.

dashboard: Streak tracker with grace day indicator
Stats cards (chapters read, active plans, badges)
ai_features: AI chapter summary generation (GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key)
badges: GET /api/badges returns badge list with earned status
ui_components: Bible Map displays 66 books with OT/NT filters
Profile screen shows user info, stats, badges

test_credentials_used.test_users: Generated dynamically with TEST_ prefix during pytest

no_mocked_apis: All APIs are real. Bible text from wldeh/bible-api CDN. AI summaries use real Emergent LLM key (GPT-5.2).
